title: Backend Python Engineer
responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CloudForge is hiring a junior backend python engineer to support developing backend services, APIs, and data-driven platform features.
raw_text: Vacancy V016: Backend Python Engineer at CloudForge. Location: Dnipro. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 0.9 years. Required skills: python, fastapi, django, postgresql, docker, celery, sqlalchemy, pytest, flask. Optional skills: prometheus, microservices. Responsibilities: design and maintain backend APIs; optimize database queries and service performance; ship reliable services with tests and monitoring.
